name: Pyrare | The Pink Corruption
description:
“It’s not their fault they are infected.”

You and Pyrare are on your way to the next tree of life for the circle shapes.

But an infected got in your way, you could’ve killed them, you would’ve, if Pyrare didn’t intervene and stop you.

| • Let me know in the comments if I missed anything ! ! ! • |
creator: LaHoneyBee
